contract_claim: parseSSEEvents silently drops data-only SSE events (those without an 'event:' field). The MCP SDK may send events with only a 'data:' field (the default unnamed 'message' event type). These would be accumulated into currentEvent.data but never pushed to the events array because the flush condition requires currentEvent.event to be truthy.
observed_behavior: parseSSEEvents silently drops data-only SSE events (those without an 'event:' field). The MCP SDK may send events with only a 'data:' field (the default unnamed 'message' event type). These would be accumulated into currentEvent.data but never pushed to the events array because the flush condition requires currentEvent.event to be truthy.
